episodes.title: Epstein Files: Power, Money, Human Trafficking | ARTE.tv Documentary
episodes.description:
How did Jeffrey Epstein, a maths teacher, amass a huge fortune, build a vast network of influence and sexually assault hundreds of young women, some of them minors, without being investigated for so long? A look back at the sexual predator’s life and how the Epstein Files are exposing corruption at the highest level.

Epstein Files: Power, Money, Human Trafficking | ARTE.tv Documentary
📆 Available until: 25/02/2027

ARTE.tv Documentary 📺 is ARTE.tv's YouTube channel in English, where we share new videos every day, including in-depth documentaries and reports on geopolitics, economy, society, culture, science and the environment 🌎.
